headline: CEO Blake Sterling's 'Eco-Farms' Exploit: Workers Paid Pennies!
subtext: Greenwashed empire crumbles! Sterling's sustainable farms built on shocking wage theft and squalor.
story_summary: Blake Sterling, the 'visionary' behind 'GreenHarvest Eco-Farms,' lauded for ethical sourcing, has been exposed for paying his farmworkers less than minimum wage, forcing them into substandard housing, and denying basic benefits while his personal wealth soared.
visual_concept: A split image. One side features a pristine, sun-drenched 'eco-farm' with perfectly aligned crops and a smiling Blake Sterling. The other side reveals the grimy, overcrowded living quarters of the farmworkers, with shadowy, tired figures and barren, neglected patches of earth.
background_elements: Piles of unpicked produce rotting in the field
Gleaming luxury car next to a dilapidated shanty
Shadowy hands reaching for meager wages
A 'Fair Trade' sticker peeling off to reveal 'Made with Cheap Labor'
color_palette: Vibrant greens (desaturated and sickly on the 'exploited' side)
Harsh, artificial yellows (spotlight on Sterling's side)
